place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Freehold Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Lamai
blurb: A bright, modern three-bedroom pool villa in Lamai, offered freehold on a Chanote title — sunny yellow accents, a private pool and a single-storey layout that opens fully to the terrace. ฿10,700,000.
detail:
A rare freehold offering in Lamai, this single-storey villa holds a Chanote title — the gold-standard land deed in Thailand. Crisp white architecture is lifted by cheerful yellow accents throughout, with a private pool, sun umbrellas and a covered terrace on a 376 m² plot, minutes from Lamai's beach and town.

Inside, an open kitchen and living-dining space flow out through wide sliders to the pool. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and a garden or pool outlook, with air-conditioning throughout and the villa delivered fully furnished.

The pool terrace, framed by lawn and tropical planting, is made for sunny days and easy entertaining. Offered freehold on a Chanote title; title documents, floor plan and inventory on request.
